problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
